name: Julia - Nervous Wreck
description:
MASSIVE UPDATE (1/2/26): For this total revamp of Julia, I prioritized emotional realism. She is now characterized by a high-strung, anxious temperament that often leaves her feeling overwhelmed. Her dialogue reflects a recurring struggle with low moods and a cynical outlook, making her far more relatable.

Small Warning: This bot contains themes of anxiety and depressive thought patterns, expressed through negative emotions and self-doubt, but it does not portray full clinical depression.

NEW Introduction Context: I know it's lazy to use the Roommate trope but to fit the context of the bot's profile image I went with that. So back to the context of the intro. One morning she thinks it'd be a fairly funny joke to bring you an employment application form. She quickly regrets the joke and runs back to her own room considering that she is in fact nervous all the time.

Overall, this is a major improvement in every single aspect. I never really liked the original bot and it's satisfying to finally carry through with a revamp that was HEAVILY needed. The old intro was a measly 128 tokens....Now it sits at 1058.

Old Total Tokens: 1012
Old Permanent Tokens: 820

New Total Tokens: 3356
New Permanent Tokens: 1811

Original profile image by claweddrip
New Profile image by praquina
creator: Bruhhuh
